name: EPG Enricharr
description: Enrich EPG data for Plex DVR recognition
author: epg-enricharr-team

fields.label: Enable plugin
fields.description: Enable or disable the entire plugin

fields.label: Enable TV enrichment
fields.description: Parse episode strings (S2E36) and add season/episode metadata

fields.label: Enable sports enrichment (V2)
fields.description: Enable year-based season numbering and date-based episodes for sports programmes

fields.label: Auto-mark previously shown
fields.description: Mark programmes as previously_shown if not explicitly new

fields.label: Dry run mode
fields.description: Log changes without writing to database

fields.label: Enable news enrichment
fields.description: Year-based season and date-based episode numbering for news programmes

fields.label: Sports season format
fields.description: Format string for sports season. Tokens: {YYYY} {YY} {MM} {DD} {hh} {mm} {channel}

fields.label: Sports episode format
fields.description: Format string for sports episode. Tokens: {YYYY} {YY} {MM} {DD} {hh} {mm} {channel}

fields.label: News season format
fields.description: Format string for news season. Tokens: {YYYY} {YY} {MM} {DD} {hh} {mm} {channel}

fields.label: News episode format
fields.description: Format string for news episode. Tokens: {YYYY} {YY} {MM} {DD} {hh} {mm} {channel}

fields.label: Movie detection patterns (comma-separated regex)
fields.description: Regex patterns to identify movies. Matched against categories and title.

fields.label: Sports detection patterns (comma-separated regex)
fields.description: Regex patterns to identify sports programmes. Matched against categories and title.

fields.label: News detection patterns (comma-separated regex)
fields.description: Regex patterns to identify news programmes. Matched against categories and title.

fields.label: Enable sports title grouping (V3)
fields.description: Split sports titles using regex patterns for Plex grouping. Sets title to capture group 1; preserves original in custom_properties.original_title.

fields.label: Sports title grouping patterns (list of regex)
fields.description: Ordered list of regex patterns for sports title matching. First match wins. Group 1 = new title, group 2 (optional) = subtitle. Example: ["^(AFL).*:\\s*(.+)$", "^(NRL).*:\\s*(.+)$"]

actions.label: Enrich EPG on Refresh
actions.description: Automatically enrich EPG data when it refreshes
